feat.name: Arcana of Iron
feat.text: You eschew wands and staves for more advanced weaponry. You become trained in advanced weapons. If you gain the weapon expertise class feature, your proficiency in martial and advanced weapons increases to expert. The extra damage you deal with Bespell Strikes increases to 1d8.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
